zh.Elford, Staffordshire, England: 英國斯塔福爾艾爾福德
zh.lifeSummary: Cecily de Bredbury是Adam de Bredbury of Harden的女兒，於1327年出生在英國爾布雷德波利。她於1345年與Sir John Peter de Arderne在英國結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1387年在英國爾阿爾德福德享年60歲。

zh-hans.Elford, Staffordshire, England: 英国斯塔福爾艾爾福德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Cecily de Bredbury是Adam de Bredbury of Harden的女儿，于1327年出生在英国爾布雷德波利。她于1345年与Sir John Peter de Arderne在英国结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1387年在英国爾阿爾德福德享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bredbury
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Cecily
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cecilie
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cicely
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Cecily de Bredbury was born in 1327, in Bredbury, Cheshire, England as the daughter of Adam de Bredbury of Harden. She married Sir John Peter de Arderne in 1345, in England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1387, in Aldford, Cheshire, England, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Cecily de Bredbury est née en 1327, à Bredbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, fille de Adam de Bredbury of Harden. Elle a épousé Sir John Peter de Arderne en 1345, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1387, à Aldford, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Cecily de Bredbury wurde 1327 in Bredbury, Cheshire, England, als Tochter von Adam de Bredbury of Harden geboren. Sie hat 1345 in England Sir John Peter de Arderne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1387 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Aldford, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Cecily de Bredbury è nata il nel 1327 nel Bredbury, Cheshire, England come figlia di Adam de Bredbury of Harden. Lei sposato Sir John Peter de Arderne nel 1345, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1387, nel Aldford, Cheshire, England, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.Aldford, Cheshire, England: イギリスチェシュアイアアルドフォード

ja.Aldford Alvanley, Cheshire, England: イギリスチェシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Cecily de Bredburyは1327年にイギリスチェシュアイアブレドブリーでAdam de Bredbury of Hardenの娘として生まれた。1345年にイギリスでSir John Peter de Arderneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1387年にイギリスチェシュアイアアルドフォードで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Cecily de Bredbury(은)는 1327년 영국 체실르 브레드버이에서 Adam de Bredbury of Harden의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1345년 영국에서 Sir John Peter de Arderne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1387년 영국 체실르 알드퍼드에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Cecily de Bredbury nasceu em 1327, em Bredbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra filha de Adam de Bredbury of Harden. Ela casou-se com Sir John Peter de Arderne em 1345, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1387, em Aldford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Cecily de Bredbury родилась в 1327 г. в местности бредбури, чешир, Англия. Её отца звали Adam de Bredbury of Harden. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Peter de Arderne в 1345 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1387 г. в местности алдфорд, чешир, Англия в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cecily de Bredbury nació en 1327, en Bredbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra como hija de Adam de Bredbury of Harden. Se casó con Sir John Peter de Arderne en 1345, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1387, en Aldford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 60 años.
